text:
http://fossil.bsdjunk.com/enlightenment/vpatch?from=87db13b52c6408cd&to=4a389d64e7460120

FreeBSD 10.0 and this change fixes this:

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/devel/efl/Makefile?r1=375860&r2=376037

Since 10.0 is EOL; force usage of port openssl

This fixed the EEL issue that this patch originally was fixing.
